events.title: Baby Storytime
events.description: Sing, play, and read to your baby! Please plan to arrive early to ensure admittance. Arrivals more than 5 minutes late are not guaranteed entrance. events.title: Drop-In 3D Printing – Quick Prints @ Hillsdale Branch
events.description: Are you interested in 3D Printing? Join us at the Hillsdale Library for Drop-In 3D Printing. 3D printing will be offered Mondays and Wednesdays and is first come, first served. Drop-in to print any of our files available on our USB flash drive that are 35 minutes or less. If you would like to request a longer print, you can sign up for an appointment here .

events.title: Pajama Storytime
events.description: Snuggle up for a cozy evening at Pajama Storytime! Wear your comfiest pajamas (grown-ups can too!) and bring along your favorite stuffy for a night filled with stories, songs, and rhymes. For ages 0-5. Adults must be accompanied by a child. Plan to arrive early to ensure admittance.

events.title: Move and Groove Storytime
events.description: Move and Groove Storytime has two sessions: 10:15 am and 11:00 am. Families who cannot attend the 10:15 storytime are encouraged to stay for the 11:00. Dance your wiggles away in this interactive storytime. Creative movement set to songs and stories for children 18 months+ and caregivers. Adults must be accompanied by a child. Registration not required.
events.venue: Oak Room Patio, Main Library 1st Floor

events.title: Toddler Storytime @ Hillsdale Branch
events.description: *Toddler Storytime begins at 10:30 AM—before the library officially opens! Please note the library will open to everyone at 11:00 AM*. Join us and get up and get moving with your toddler! Full of books, songs and tons of fun designed to help develop your child's language and motor skills. This program is intended for children ages 18 months-3 years old

events.title: Drop-In 3D Printing – Quick Prints @ Hillsdale Branch
events.description: Are you interested in 3D Printing? Join us at the Hillsdale Library for Drop-In 3D Printing. 3D printing will be offered Mondays and Wednesdays and is first come, first served. Drop-in to print any of our files available on our USB flash drive that are 35 minutes or less. If you would like to request a longer print, you can sign up for an appointment here .

events.title: 3D Printing Appointments @ Hillsdale Branch
events.description: Are you interested in 3D Printing? Join us at the Hillsdale Library for 3D Printing Appointments. In-person 1:1 appointments will be offered Mondays and Wednesdays. This event is first come first served- There is no registration required. Recommended ages are 6-12 This program

events.title: Drop-In 3D Printing – Quick Prints @ Hillsdale Branch
events.description: Are you interested in 3D Printing? Join us at the Hillsdale Library for Drop-In 3D Printing. 3D printing will be offered Mondays and Wednesdays and is first come, first served. Drop-in to print any of our files available on our USB flash drive that are 35 minutes or less. If you would like to request a longer print, you can sign up for an appointment here .

events.title: 3D Printing Appointments @ Hillsdale Branch

events.title: Meet the Small Pets at Hillsdale Library
events.description: Local Girls Scouts, with support from Cavy Hammy Haven and Rabbit Haven, share information about small animals like guinea pigs, hamsters, and rabbits, and how to care for them as pets. Drop by and see the animals outside the front entrance of the library on Hillsdale Blvd.

events.title: Polish Storytime
